title: Metric Submission Schema
description: Defines the structure for submitting metrics from hybrid execution mode to the backend

MetricValue.description: A metric value - must be numeric or null. String/boolean values should be placed in metadata instead.

MetricResults.description: Results from metric evaluations. Keys must be valid Python identifiers, values must be numeric or null. Maximum 50 keys per submission (aligned with MeasureResults contract).

SubmissionStatus.description:
Status of the metric submission:
- pending: Metric queued for submission
- submitted: Sent to backend
- acknowledged: Backend confirmed receipt
- failed: Submission failed
- retrying: Automatic retry in progress

ConfigurationParameters.description: The configuration parameters that produced these metrics. Free-form and may carry user-derived values (e.g. prompt templates, tool configs), so it is classified as user content for redaction/governance purposes.

configuration_run_id.description: Reference to the configuration run these metrics belong to

experiment_run_id.description: Reference to the parent experiment run

configuration.description: The configuration that was evaluated to produce these metrics

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when metrics were generated

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when submission was sent

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts for this submission

evaluation_duration_ms.description: Time taken to evaluate configuration in milliseconds

batch_id.description: Batch identifier if part of batched submission

client_version.description: Version of the client submitting metrics

strategy_preset.description: Optional advisory strategy preset metadata recorded for this metric submission.
